nodes.name: IssueColumns.tsx
nodes.summary: Defines issue column configuration constants and rendering components for inbox-style issue lists, including a column picker UI, a leading metadata cell showing status and identifier, and a trailing grid of configurable columns (assignee, project, workspace, labels, etc.).

nodes.name: IssueColumnPicker
nodes.summary: Dropdown UI component allowing users to toggle which columns are visible in the issue list and reset to defaults.

nodes.name: InboxIssueMetaLeading
nodes.summary: Renders the leading cell of an inbox issue row, showing status icon, identifier, and optional checklist step number.

nodes.name: InboxIssueTrailingColumns
nodes.summary: Renders the trailing configurable column cells for an inbox issue row, including assignee, project, workspace, parent, labels, priority, and activity columns.

nodes.name: IssueContinuationHandoff.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a collapsible card displaying an issue continuation handoff document, with clipboard copy support and auto-highlight on focus signal.

nodes.name: IssueContinuationHandoff
nodes.summary: Component showing a collapsible handoff document card with expand/collapse, clipboard copy, and scroll-into-view behaviour driven by an external focus signal.

nodes.name: IssueDocumentsSection.tsx
nodes.summary: Large feature component managing the full lifecycle of issue documents — listing, editing, saving, deleting, restoring revisions, showing diff modals, and persisting fold/collapse state per-document in localStorage.

nodes.name: IssueDocumentsSection
nodes.summary: Primary component orchestrating issue document CRUD operations with autosave, revision history, diff viewing, and collapsible document rendering.

nodes.name: IssueFiltersPopover.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a filter popover for issue lists allowing users to filter by status, priority, and assignee with checkboxes.

nodes.name: IssueFiltersPopover
nodes.summary: Popover component presenting filter options (status, priority, assignee) for issue list filtering with controlled toggle callbacks.

nodes.name: IssueGroupHeader.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a collapsible group header row for grouped issue lists, showing the group label and issue count.

nodes.name: IssueLinkQuicklook.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides a quicklook card component for issue links, showing a compact preview of issue title, description summary, status, and identifier on hover.

nodes.name: IssueQuicklookCard
nodes.summary: Renders a hoverable card preview of a linked issue with status badge, identifier, title, and truncated description.

nodes.name: IssueMonitorActivityCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders an activity card for issue monitor events, displaying scheduled monitor execution details with resolved schedule display.

nodes.name: IssueProperties.tsx
nodes.summary: Comprehensive issue properties sidebar component covering status, priority, assignee, project, model selection, execution workspace, scheduled retry, and related references — the primary metadata editing surface for issues.

nodes.name: IssueProperties
nodes.summary: Main component rendering the full issue properties panel with inline editing for all issue fields including status, priority, assignee, project, model, workspace, and retry configuration.

nodes.name: RemovableIssueReferencePill
nodes.summary: Renders an issue reference pill with a removable button and inline preview quicklook for referenced issues.

nodes.name: PropertyPicker
nodes.summary: Generic property picker popover component used within issue properties for selecting values from a list.

nodes.name: IssueRecoveryActionCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a recovery action card for issues requiring intervention, showing error evidence, wake policy, run metadata, and actionable recovery options with derived state for display.

nodes.name: IssueRecoveryActionCard
nodes.summary: Main recovery card component rendering evidence summary, run chip, metadata rows, and action buttons for issue recovery flows.

nodes.name: IssueReferenceActivitySummary.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a summary of issue references from activity data, grouping linked issues into sections with reference pills.

nodes.name: IssueReferencePill.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a compact pill badge linking to a referenced issue, displaying its identifier and status icon.

nodes.name: IssueReferencePill
nodes.summary: Pill-style badge linking to a referenced issue with status icon and identifier, supporting optional hover card.

nodes.name: IssueRelatedWorkPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a panel displaying related work items grouped by source label, using issue reference pills for each linked issue.

nodes.name: IssueRow.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a single issue row in the issue list table with status, title, productivity review badge, and recovery/blocker chips.

nodes.name: IssueRow
nodes.summary: Component rendering a clickable issue row with status icon, title, and configurable trailing columns including recovery chips and productivity badges.

nodes.name: IssueRunLedger.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays a ledger of all runs for an issue including live and historical runs, with model profiling, stop reason labels, watchdog decisions, and run duration formatting.

nodes.name: IssueRunLedger
nodes.summary: Container component for the issue run ledger that fetches run activity data and merges with live run state.

nodes.name: IssueRunLedgerContent
nodes.summary: Renders the full run ledger table including run rows with model badge, timing, stop reason, continuation status, and watchdog decision board.

nodes.name: IssueScheduledRetryCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a card showing scheduled retry information for an issue, including retry time and a retry-now action, plus a reusable error band component.

nodes.name: IssueScheduledRetryCard
nodes.summary: Component displaying the next scheduled retry time with a retry-now mutation button and countdown.

nodes.name: IssuesList.tsx
nodes.summary: Main issue list view component supporting list and kanban view modes, issue grouping, local search, column customization, virtual scrolling, and sub-issue progress strips.

nodes.name: IssuesList
nodes.summary: Primary issues list component orchestrating data fetching, grouping, searching, sorting, and rendering of issues in list or kanban layout.

nodes.name: SubIssueProgressSummaryStrip
nodes.summary: Renders a collapsible progress summary strip for sub-issues showing completion counts and status breakdown.

nodes.name: IssuesQuicklook.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a quicklook overlay panel listing issues associated with a breadcrumb context using the IssueLinkQuicklook component.

nodes.name: IssueThreadInteractionCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Large component handling all types of agent-thread interaction cards including task suggestion, user questions, confirmation requests, and displays nested task trees with status tracking.

nodes.name: IssueThreadInteractionCard
nodes.summary: Dispatcher component routing interaction card rendering to the appropriate sub-card (task suggestion, questions, confirmation) based on interaction kind.

nodes.name: SuggestTasksCard
nodes.summary: Renders an interactive card for agent-suggested tasks with approve, reject, and edit-and-approve actions on a nested task tree.

nodes.name: AskUserQuestionsCard
nodes.summary: Renders the agent question card allowing the user to respond to agent questions with freeform text or multiple-choice options.

nodes.name: RequestConfirmationCard
nodes.summary: Renders a confirmation request card for agent actions requiring user approval, showing target details and approve/reject controls.

nodes.name: IssueWorkspaceCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the workspace configuration card for an issue, allowing selection of execution workspace mode (reuse, new, none) and displaying workspace status and details.

nodes.name: IssueWorkspaceCard
nodes.summary: Component for configuring and displaying the execution workspace attached to an issue, with mode selection and workspace status.

nodes.name: JsonSchemaForm.tsx
nodes.summary: Generic JSON Schema-driven form component with field validation, default value resolution, and support for object, array, string, number, boolean, and enum field types.

nodes.name: validateField
nodes.summary: Validates a single form field value against its JSON Schema definition, returning an error string or null.

nodes.name: validateJsonSchemaForm
nodes.summary: Validates all fields in a JSON Schema form, returning a map of field errors.

nodes.name: getDefaultForSchema
nodes.summary: Recursively computes default values for a JSON Schema node, handling nested objects and arrays.

nodes.name: JsonSchemaForm
nodes.summary: Top-level form component rendering all fields defined by a JSON Schema with validation and change callbacks.

nodes.name: KanbanBoard.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a Kanban board layout with columns per workflow status, displaying issue cards with assignee, priority, and run handoff indicators.

nodes.name: KanbanBoard
nodes.summary: Main Kanban board component grouping issues into status columns and rendering KanbanColumn subcomponents.

nodes.name: KanbanCard
nodes.summary: Renders an individual Kanban card with issue title, assignee avatar, priority icon, and optional run handoff indicator.

nodes.name: KeyboardShortcutsCheatsheet.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a keyboard shortcuts reference panel listing all available hotkeys in a formatted cheatsheet layout.

nodes.name: KeyboardShortcutsCheatsheetContent
nodes.summary: Renders the content grid of keyboard shortcut entries grouped by category.

nodes.name: Layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Root application shell component composing the sidebar, breadcrumb bar, properties panel, command palette, toast viewport, mobile nav, and all global dialogs into the main layout structure.

nodes.name: Layout
nodes.summary: Top-level layout component wiring together all global UI regions and context providers for the application shell.

nodes.name: LiveRunWidget.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a floating widget showing the live run chat surface with heartbeat status and live transcript streaming for an active agent run.

nodes.name: LiveRunWidget
nodes.summary: Component managing the live run chat widget with heartbeat polling, transcript streaming, and run status display.

nodes.name: ManagedRoutinesList.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a list of managed routines (scheduled agent tasks) in a table format with schedule details and last run status.

nodes.name: ManagedRoutinesList
nodes.summary: Component listing managed routines with schedule expression, last run info, and navigation to routine detail.
